title: Teaching LLMs a Low-Resource Language: Enhancing Code Completion in Pharo
innovation_summary: Teaching LLMs a Low-Resource Language: Enhancing Code Completion in Pharo: Second, we introduce a set of Pharo code completion benchmarks designed to evaluate whether models (i) learn Pharo's syntax and (ii) accurately complete masked Pharo code.
